- [ ] 🔒 Security enhancement
- [ ] 🧹 Code refactoring
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration change

## ✅ Pre-merge Checklist

### **Code Quality**
- [ ] Code follows project coding standards
- [ ] No debugging code left in (console.log, var_dump, etc.)
- [ ] Error handling implemented appropriately
- [ ] Code is well-commented and self-documenting
- [ ] No hardcoded values (use configuration)
- [ ] Proper logging implemented where needed

### **Testing & Quality Assurance**
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Edge cases considered and tested
- [ ] Error scenarios tested
- [ ] Performance impact assessed

### **Security & Compliance**
- [ ] Security review completed
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] Output encoding applied
- [ ] Authentication/authorization verified

### **Documentation & Communication**
- [ ] PR description is clear and complete
- [ ] Related issues linked
- [ ] Breaking changes documented
- [ ] Screenshots/videos provided (if UI changes)
- [ ] Reviewers assigned

### **Compatibility & Standards**
- [ ] Backward compatibility maintained (or breaking changes documented)
- [ ] Cross-browser compatibility verified
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness verified
- [ ] Accessibility guidelines followed
- [ ] OpenCart coding standards followed

---

## 🔍 Review Guidelines

### **For Reviewers**
Please review the following aspects:

1. **Code Quality**
   - [ ] Code is readable and maintainable
   - [ ] Follows OpenCart conventions
   - [ ] No code duplication
   - [ ] Proper error handling

2. **Security**
   - [ ] Input validation and sanitization
   - [ ] Output encoding
   - [ ] Authentication and authorization
   - [ ] No security vulnerabilities

3. **Performance**
   - [ ] No performance regressions
   - [ ] Efficient database queries
   - [ ] Proper caching implementation
   - [ ] Resource optimization

4. **Testing**
   - [ ] Adequate test coverage
   - [ ] Tests are meaningful and effective
   - [ ] Manual testing scenarios covered

### **Review Checklist for Reviewers**
- [ ] Code review completed
- [ ] Security review completed
- [ ] Performance review completed
- [ ] Documentation review completed
- [ ] Testing review completed
